description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named puNES that runs on push to the master branch. The workflow should build puNES for Windows with different configurations (64-bit and 32-bit) using MSYS2, QT5, and various tools. It should configure the environment, download and extract QT5 and DLLs, run autogen.sh, build D3D9 and OpenGL versions, and upload the resulting artifacts.
